title: After update New Kanban view didnt show all columns set to card on kanban desktop in app mobile

posts.author: Renata (Costa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Kanban on mobile is no longer displaying all the columns selected to be presented to the card on desktop.

The layout changed after the update to fix the scrolling screen, which was moving columns instead of scrolling.

This greatly impacts the team that works with the CRM, access to information is consulted in almost 100% of use by cell phone.

Anyone else with this problem? Any suggested solution?
